content_markdown: The speed of a wave is defined as

options.label: A
options.text: the speed at which the particles of the wave vibrate.

options.label: B
options.text: the speed of the medium through which the wave passes.

options.label: C
options.text: the speed of transfer of the energy of the wave.

options.label: D
options.text: the speed at which the vibrations of the wave are produced.

vibe_explanation: Wave speed refers to the rate at which the wave profile (and thus the energy it carries) travels through a medium. It is distinct from the particle speed (which varies in simple harmonic motion) or the speed of the medium itself (which generally stays in place).
